prompt.content: The figure is an isosceles trapezoid. Which reflection carries it onto itself?

<svg viewBox='0 0 260 180' role='img' aria-label='An isosceles trapezoid with a dashed vertical line of symmetry'><polygon points='60,130 200,130 165,55 95,55' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='130' y1='35' x2='130' y2='150' stroke='gray' stroke-width='2' stroke-dasharray='6 5'/><text x='138' y='45' font-size='13'>line m</text></svg>

choices.content: A reflection across the vertical line through the midpoints of the bases
A reflection across the longer base
A reflection across one of the non-parallel sides

steps.content: An isosceles trapezoid has one line of reflection symmetry: the line through the midpoints of its two bases.
